rules.desc: the first line must be `// name: weather-app`
the screen is true black (OLED watch face)
hero temp, H/L, 3-day rows and tiles all bind sys.weather
the AIR QUALITY tile binds sys.airquality
no photo backdrop on the watch — drop the sys.photo image
no map panes on the watch — satellite/AQ maps don't fit a 320dp square
